summary:
Claim: All factors are relevant in assessing fracture risks in gold restorations.
Evidence: - Restoration design ensures even stress distribution
           - Alloy choice influences strength and ductility
           - Metal ratios affect wear resistance and biocompatibility
Answer: D (All of Above)
